title: Krath Holy Battle Suit
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:KrathHolySuit.jpg|thumb|180px|Krath Holy Battle armor.]]

The '''Krath holy battle suit''' was the suit of [[Armor/Legends|armor]] that was traditionally worn by [[Krath/Legends|Krath]] who guarded their [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark]] temples during the [[Krath Holy Crusade]]. It provided resistance to elemental damage, as well as damage from some sonic frequencies.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''
